context: Tests whether the agent correctly analyzes multi-model eval results to produce a structured comparison report, including all required tables with correct formatting, symbol thresholds, pattern classification (A/B/C/D), baseline interpretation, and publishing recommendations.

checklist.name: Overall summary table
checklist.description: Report contains an overall summary table with columns for Model, Without Skill score, With Skill score, and Delta for each of the three models

checklist.name: Per-scenario breakdown
checklist.description: Report contains a per-scenario breakdown showing scores for each model (haiku, sonnet, opus) for each scenario individually

checklist.name: Per-criterion table
checklist.description: Report contains a per-criterion breakdown table showing scores per model for each individual criterion

checklist.name: Correct symbol thresholds
checklist.description: Symbol legend or usage applies: ✅ for >= 80%, 🟡 for >= 50% and < 80%, 🔴 for < 50% — and symbols are consistently applied to criterion scores in the per-criterion table

checklist.name: Baseline interpretation
checklist.description: Report explicitly interprets what the baseline (without-skill) scores reveal — at minimum distinguishes between high-baseline and low-baseline scenarios, or notes variable baselines across models

checklist.name: Pattern A identified
checklist.description: Report identifies at least one criterion where ALL models score poorly (< 50%) and labels it or describes it as a universal failure / tile gap (Pattern A)

checklist.name: Pattern B identified
checklist.description: Report identifies at least one criterion where haiku scores poorly but sonnet and/or opus score well, and labels it or describes it as a capability gradient (Pattern B)

checklist.name: Pattern D identified
checklist.description: Report identifies at least one scenario where the without-skill score exceeds the with-skill score for a model and labels it or describes it as a regression (Pattern D)

checklist.name: Fix before publish recommendation
checklist.description: Report recommends fixing issues before publishing (does NOT recommend publishing) given the regressions present in the data

checklist.name: eval-improve mentioned
checklist.description: Report mentions tessl-labs/eval-improve or the eval-improve tool as the suggested next step for addressing the regressions

checklist.name: Re-run offer
checklist.description: Report offers or suggests re-running the comparison after fixes are applied to verify improvement
